title: Assembly
description: A hangman-style word guessing game built with React.js, featuring dynamic word selection and real-time feedback.

title: Tenzies
description: A simple dice game where players roll ten dice and aim to get all dice to show the same number, utilizing React.js for interactive gameplay.

title: Car Traders
description: A full-stack web application for buying and selling cars, featuring user authentication, car listings, and an admin dashboard.

title: Counter
description: A simple counter application built with React.js, allowing users to increment, decrement, and reset the count with a user-friendly interface.

title: Calculator
description: A basic calculator application built with React.js, providing functionality for addition, subtraction, multiplication, and division with a clean and intuitive design.

title: Blog
description: A simple blog application built with React.js.
